message:
feat(lab): virtual network runtime, spork oracle, and harness extensions

Extend the simulation lab with distributed testing infrastructure and
enhanced spork oracle capabilities:

Lab runtime (src/lab/runtime.rs):
- Add VirtualNetworkRuntime bridge for testing distributed spawn, cancel,
  and result delivery flows without real network I/O
- Implement RemoteRuntime trait backed by simulated network with pending
  results tracking via Arc<Mutex<BTreeMap>>
- Add deterministic scheduling helpers for multi-node test scenarios
- Expand runtime introspection APIs for test assertions

Network harness (src/lab/network/harness.rs):
- Add VirtualNetworkRuntime struct implementing RemoteCap + RemoteRuntime
- Add SharedPendingResults type alias for pending result futures
- Import and wire up Cx, RemoteCap, RemoteError, RemoteRuntime

Oracle (src/lab/oracle/):
- mod.rs: expand oracle verdict API with richer diagnostic output
- spork.rs: new spork-specific oracle module for deterministic ordering
  verification in simulated environments

Meta (src/lab/meta/mutation.rs):
- Adjust mutation operators for updated runtime state layout

Module (src/lab/mod.rs):
- Re-export new oracle and harness types
- Update spork_harness reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
